headline: Jack Henry and Google Cloud Expand Collaboration to Deliver AI-Driven Security for Banks and Credit Unions
summary: Jack Henry® (Nasdaq: JKHY) and Google Cloud today announced an expanded collaboration to deliver AI-driven security capabilities for banks and credit unions. Building on their strategic relationship established in 2022, Jack Henry will use Google Cloud's suite of agentic defense products to develop a proprietary AI security platform purpose-built for the financial services ecosystem. This initiative will strengthen cyber resilience for financial institutions and help them defend against emerging

headline: Will New Regional Bank Wins and Hosted Platforms Shift Jack Henry & Associates' (JKHY) Investment Narrative?
summary: In mid-June 2026, First American Bank and Trust and CorTrust Bank announced they had selected Jack Henry & Associates’ hosted core and Banno Digital Platform solutions to modernize operations, strengthen digital banking, and improve resiliency. These wins highlight growing demand for Jack Henry’s open ecosystem and integrated digital, card, and small-business tools as regional banks upgrade their technology foundations. Now, we’ll examine how these new bank partnerships and expanding use of...
